ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator's name */,
  "research_questions" TEXT /* Research questions being addressed */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES researchers ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number */,
  "hole" TEXT /* Hole number */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Calibration date of the sensor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
